title: get_farms_should_return_list_of_farms
description: Test GET /api/v1/farms to ensure it returns a 200 status with a list of farm records including region, district, and metadata.

title: post_farms_should_create_new_farm_with_valid_data
description: Test POST /api/v1/farms with valid farm data to verify it returns 201 or 200 status and the created farm record appears in subsequent GET /api/v1/farms responses.

title: post_farms_should_return_validation_error_for_invalid_data
description: Test POST /api/v1/farms with missing or malformed fields to confirm it returns a 400 or 422 validation error and prevents farm creation.

title: get_dashboard_should_return_system_summary
description: Test GET /api/v1/dashboard to verify it returns 200 status with counts, productivity metrics, and subsidy totals for dashboard KPIs.

title: get_fields_should_return_list_of_fields
description: Test GET /api/v1/fields to ensure it returns 200 status with a collection of field records for browsing and drill-down.

title: get_analysis_should_return_list_of_soil_analysis_records
description: Test GET /api/v1/analysis to verify it returns 200 status with soil analysis run data for monitoring historical results.

title: get_subsidies_should_return_subsidy_recommendations
description: Test GET /api/v1/subsidies to confirm it returns 200 status with subsidy data including base subsidy, multipliers, and final recommended subsidy.

title: get_irrigation_should_return_irrigation_recommendations
description: Test GET /api/v1/irrigation to verify it returns 200 status with recommended water amounts and urgency levels for irrigation guidance.

title: get_credit_score_should_return_farmer_credit_data
description: Test GET /api/v1/credit_score to ensure it returns 200 status with credit score components, final score, and risk tier for financial risk profiling.

title: get_simulation_should_return_market_simulation_data
description: Test GET /api/v1/simulation to verify it returns 200 status with active scenario and simulated metrics for yield and market scenario evaluation.
